patterns: Hi / Hello / Hey / Good morning / Is anyone there? / Greetings / Howdy
responses: Hello! I am your College Assistant. How can I help you today?

patterns: Bye / See you later / Goodbye / I'm leaving / Have a good day
responses: Goodbye! Feel free to reach out if you have more questions. Have a great day!

patterns: Admission process / How to join? / When do admissions start? / Admission criteria / Entrance exam for admission / Apply for college
responses: Admissions usually begin in June. You can apply through the official college portal. Selection is based on merit or entrance exam scores.

patterns: Where is the library? / Library timings / Library opening hours / Can I borrow books? / Return library books / Library location
responses: The central library is in Block B, 2nd floor. It's open from 9 AM to 6 PM, Monday to Saturday.

patterns: How to pay fees? / Semester fee due date / Tuition fees / Online fee payment / Fine for late payment / Fee structure for B.Tech
responses: Fees can be paid via the college ERP portal or at the accounts office in the Admin block. Please check the portal for your specific fee breakdown.

patterns: Is there a hostel? / Hostel facilities / Hostel fee / Boys hostel / Girls hostel / How to apply for hostel?
responses: Yes, we have separate hostels for boys and girls with 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, and mess facilities. Apply at the Warden's office.

patterns: When is the next internal? / Exam schedule / Timetable for exams / Midterm dates / Practical exam schedule / End semester exams
responses: Internal exams are usually held every 2 months. The official timetable is posted on the department notice board and the student portal.

patterns: Which companies visit? / Placement record / Highest package / Average salary / Training and Placement Cell / Internship opportunities
responses: Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. The highest package last year was 12 LPA. Visit the T&P cell in the Admin block for details.

patterns: How to get Wi-Fi password? / College Wi-Fi access / Internet in campus / Student Wi-Fi login / Wi-Fi registration
responses: Register your laptop MAC address at the IT cell to get your personal login credentials. Wi-Fi is available across all academic blocks.

patterns: What is in the canteen? / Canteen location / Mess menu / Food in college / Where to eat? / Canteen opening hours
responses: The canteen is located near the playground. It serves snacks, lunch, and beverages from 8:30 AM to 7:00 PM.

patterns: Is tomorrow a holiday? / Academic calendar / List of holidays / Next vacation / Is college closed on Saturday?
responses: Please refer to the academic calendar on the official website for the updated holiday list and vacation dates.

patterns: Download syllabus / Course curriculum / Subject list / Where to find syllabus? / B.Tech syllabus
responses: The syllabus for all branches is available on the college website under the 'Academics' section.

patterns: Principal office / Contact number / College email / How to reach office? / Emergency contact
responses: You can contact the main office at 011-XXXXXXX or email info@college.edu. The Principal's office is in the Admin block, ground floor.

patterns: Scholarship info / Financial aid / Government scholarships / How to apply for scholarship? / Fee waiver
responses: The college offers various merit-cum-means scholarships. Visit the administrative office to check your eligibility for state and central schemes.

patterns: Anti-ragging policy / Report ragging / Is ragging allowed? / Complaint against ragging
responses: Our campus is strictly anti-ragging. Any such activity should be reported immediately to the Anti-Ragging Committee or the HOD.
